name: io.github.COSTRINITY/vigil-compliance-mcp
description: Pre-flight compliance checks your AI agent calls before it acts, plus signed, audit-grade records after, mapped to the EU AI Act, India's DPDP, and 11 more regimes.

environmentVariables.name: VIGIL_OWNER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your VIGIL operator UUID (from your dashboard URL).

environmentVariables.name: VIGIL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your VIGIL API key (vigil_...). Authenticates tool calls.

environmentVariables.name: VIGIL_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: VIGIL base URL; override only for self-hosted.
